title: Simple Day and Death Counter
body:
![Datapack Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/662dcb326af84dc41a28ad48886a220c7017f2fa.png)

## Simple Day and Death Counter
This is a Simple Datapack I Created, And it shows your World/ServerWorld Days and Your Player Deaths as Counters, There positioned on the Action bar AKA the Hotbar of the Player.

## Compatibility?
- You need Minecraft 1.21.5 Java Edition.
- Works on Singleplayer Worlds, ServerWorlds **Untested**.

## Installation
First of all This Datapack will Not work as a .zip You need to Unzip/Extract it inside the World datapacks folder to Run.

Datapacks Location:
`.minecraft > saves > WORLDNAME > datapacks` <--
